title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 92.060 - Back taxes, how collected
text:
92.060.  Back taxes, how collected. — All taxes, interest and register's fees contained in the back tax books described in section 92.050 shall be computed, charged and collected in the same manner as is now or as may be hereafter from time to time provided by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 7739) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7591; 1919 § 9001; 1909 § 9852 
Collection of back taxes, Chaps. 140, 141 
Special tax bills, notice of suit to enforce payment, 88.923
